title: elytrigia × duvalii
intro: Elytrigia × duvalii, a hybrid grass species, is a cross between Elytrigia juncea and Elytrigia repens, known for its hardy and adaptable nature. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Elytrigia × duvalii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic to prevent the spread of infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
